__comment: GoraphDB Grafana Dashboard — Overview panels for monitoring a GoraphDB cluster.
__usage: Import this JSON into Grafana via Dashboards > Import, or deploy as a ConfigMap with the grafana_dashboard label.

panels.title: Query Rate
panels.description: Total Cypher queries per second across all pods. Source: graphdb_queries_total counter (metrics.go).

panels.title: Slow Queries
panels.description: Slow queries per second (exceeding SlowQueryThreshold). Source: graphdb_slow_queries_total.

panels.title: Node & Edge Count
panels.description: Current number of nodes and edges per pod. Source: graphdb_nodes_current, graphdb_edges_current gauges.

panels.title: Cache Hit Rate
panels.description: Node cache hit rate. High hit rates (>90%) indicate the cache budget is sized correctly. Source: graphdb_cache_hits_total, graphdb_cache_misses_total.

panels.title: Node Cache Memory Usage
panels.description: Memory used by the node LRU cache vs configured budget. Source: graphdb_node_cache_bytes_used, graphdb_node_cache_budget_bytes.

panels.title: Write Operations
panels.description: Node and edge creation/deletion rates. Source: graphdb_nodes_created_total, graphdb_edges_created_total, etc.

panels.title: Query Duration (Max)
panels.description: Maximum observed query duration. Spikes indicate expensive graph traversals. Source: graphdb_query_duration_microseconds_max.

panels.title: Index & Bloom Filter
panels.description: Index lookup rate and bloom filter effectiveness. High bloom negatives = good (avoids unnecessary edge lookups). Source: graphdb_index_lookups_total, graphdb_bloom_negatives_total.

panels.title: Query Cache
panels.description: LRU query cache utilization. Entries vs capacity shows how full the cache is. Source: graphdb_query_cache_entries, graphdb_query_cache_capacity.

title: GoraphDB Cluster Overview
